channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 23rd June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days 15 minutes delay boards carriage way pothole 400x400x40mm (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 23rd June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days 15 minutes delay boards carriage way pothole 900x300x40mm stats required (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 23rd June
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 23rd June
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 23rd June
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 23rd June
item.description:
3 month ticket with Standard tm with fway closure cut back overgrown brambles back to boundary approx 3m (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 23rd June
item.description:
28day with Standard tm with fway closure cut back overgrown nettles back to boundary approx 2.5m (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 23rd June
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 23rd June
item.description:

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 23rd June
item.description:
Please pass to relevant ahr covering this area. Please send first vegetation letter to St Thomas More Primary school instructing them to cut low hanging tree branches along this footpath.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 23rd June
item.description:
Overgrown tree Please cut back to safe 5m Standard TM with temp fw closure (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole loose again, i can hear it in bed two streets away. This keeps happening, 23rd June
item.description:
Cross roads by hare and hounds
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2-4, Cheltenham Road East, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 23rd June
item.description:
